evidence: "Very enjoyable. Saw movie 55 years ago on TV... Highly nostalgic watching it again."
"Well done report on what has never been adequately explained."
"If you are new to this subject it might be worth watching..."
"Just finished trying to watch DVD. Main menu non-functional..."
"Unnecessarily long. Perhaps I'm not sophisticated enough to appreciate the 'art' behind this movie..."
"I yawned and shut it off... ultimately I found this DVD boring."
"Bad production, bad sound, fell asleep half way thru first viewing..."
"Suggest you avoid anything with 'the UFO guy' associated with it."
"Anything directed by, produced by, or in any way associated with Bill Knell should be avoided."
"Very poor film with even worse transfer to DVD..."
"Enjoyed. Not sure what all the rave reviews are all about though..."
"I was not very impressed with this film."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for nostalgic and documentary-style content, often reflecting on past experiences. They tend to favor straightforward narratives but express dissatisfaction with production quality and specific creators, particularly Bill Knell, indicating a critical approach to media consumption.
